steps.title: Identify the requirement and the key difference
steps.content: The goal is to emphasize a DIFFERENCE between the two keepers. The notes show they served in different centuries: Barbara from 1832–1862 and Flora from 1904–1920.

steps.title: Match to the choices
steps.content:
Choice C directly compares both keepers and highlights their temporal difference (“earlier century than did Flora McNeil”), accomplishing the goal. The other choices either present them as similar (A says “both played crucial roles”), or mention only one keeper instead of contrasting the two (B and D).

That matches choice C — C is correct.
